Description.value: Adds a LINE-style red badge next to the CATUI skill point badge showing the number of challenges ready to redeem. Hooks XUiController.GetBindingValue to expose {CATUI_playerChallengesClaimable}; appends a Challenges rect to CATUI's HUDLeftStatBars Stat table with the same visual style as SkillPoints. Requires CATUI (for 7DTD 2.5). EAC must be off.
